title: Counter Component
description: Build a counter component with increment, decrement, reset controls, and step/min/max bounds using Angular component state and event binding.
checklist: Create a CounterComponent with count, step, min, and max properties
Add increment, decrement, and reset methods
Clamp count updates to min and max
Render the current count with interpolation

hints.guide: Import Component from Angular core and define the component metadata
Create numeric state properties for count, step, min, and max
Add methods to change count for increment, decrement, and reset while clamping to min/max
Bind buttons to the component click handlers
